2605.02720.title: PubMed-Ophtha: An open resource for training ophthalmology vision-language models on scientific literature
2605.02720.paper_summary: Vision-language models hold considerable promise for ophthalmology, but their development depends on large-scale, high-quality image-text datasets that remain scarce. We present PubMed-Ophtha, a hierarchical dataset of 102,023 ophthalmological image-caption pairs extracted from 15,842 open-access articles in PubMed Central. Unlike existing datasets, figures are extracted directly from article PDFs at full resolution and decomposed into their constituent panels, panel identifiers, and individual images. Each image is annotated with its imaging modality -- color fundus photography, optical coherence tomography, retinal imaging, or other -- and a mark status indicating the presence of annotation marks such as arrows. Figure captions are split into panel-level subcaptions using a two-step LLM approach, achieving a mean average sentence BLEU score of 0.913 on human-annotated data. Panel and image detection models reach a mAP@0.50 of 0.909 and 0.892, respectively, and figure extraction achieves a median IoU of 0.997. To support reproducibility, we additionally release the human-annotated ground-truth data, all trained models, and the full dataset generation pipeline.
2605.02720.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型在眼科領域具有相當大的潛力，但它們的發展依賴於大規模、高品質的圖像-文本數據集，而這些數據集仍然稀缺。我們提出了PubMed-Ophtha，這是一個包含102,023對眼科圖像-標題的分層數據集，這些數據來自於PubMed Central的15,842篇開放存取文章。與現有數據集不同，圖形是直接從文章PDF中提取的，並以全解析度分解為其組成面板、面板標識符和單獨圖像。每個圖像都被標註其成像模式——彩色眼底攝影、光學相干斷層掃描、視網膜成像或其他——以及一個標記狀態，指示是否存在如箭頭等標註標記。圖形標題使用兩步驟的LLM方法分割為面板級子標題，在人工標註數據上達到平均句子BLEU分數0.913。面板和圖像檢測模型的mAP@0.50分別達到0.909和0.892，而圖形提取的中位IoU達到0.997。為了支持可重複性，我們還發布了人工標註的真實數據、所有訓練模型以及完整的數據集生成管道。
2605.02720.author: Verena Jasmin Hallitschke et.al.
2605.02720.authors: Verena Jasmin Hallitschke, Carsten Eickhoff, Philipp Berens
